title: EAST COUNTY RESOLUTIONS - 211info
text: CITY OF GRESHAM EAST COUNTY RESOLUTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists people to communicate, problem solving, and find solutions to their conflicts. Serves neighbors, businesses, landlords, and tenants. Workshops and courses in mediation and conflict communication are provided. Facilitators are provided for group issues. 1333 NW Eastman Parkway Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, weekends and evenings by appointment Email (503) 618-3247 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 618-3000 Main phone (503) 823-3333 Non-Emergency Police (503) 618-2373 Utility Billing Main phone (503) 618-3247 East County Resolutions Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more informaton. A phone interview will be arranged. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Fairview, Gresham, Troutdale, and Wood Village, and unincorporated east Multnomah County Services: Conflict Resolution Training Landlord/Tenant Dispute Resolution Mediation Organizational Conflict Resolution Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF GRESHAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - LIVABILITY TEAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - RENTAL HOUSING INSPECTION PROGRAM CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF GRESHAM POLICE DEPARTMENT UTILITIES - UTILITY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF GRESHAM
